Weapon.description: A material item designed or used to kill, wound, or inflict damage on persons, structures, or systems. Class tree parallels the CCO Artifact Ontology weapon hierarchy (bridge: weapons-profile-cco.ttl); grounded as gufo:FunctionalComplex via weapons-profile-gufo.ttl.

properties.name: make
properties.description: Manufacturer or maker name as recorded in the source record, e.g. 'SIG Sauer'. Parallels NIEM nc:ItemMakeName.

properties.name: model
properties.description: Model name or number as recorded in the source record, e.g. 'P365'. Parallels NIEM nc:ItemModelName.

properties.name: caliber
properties.description: Caliber or gauge designation, e.g. '9mm', '12-gauge'. Parallels NIEM nc:FirearmCaliberText.

properties.name: serialNumber
properties.description: Manufacturer serial number identifying the individual weapon (subPropertyOf uco-core:externalIdentifier).

properties.name: serialNumberObliterated
properties.description: True when the serial number has been removed, obliterated, or altered (18 U.S.C. § 922(k)).

Firearm.description: A weapon that will, is designed to, or may readily be converted to expel a projectile by the action of an explosive, including its frame or receiver (18 U.S.C. § 921(a)(3); CCO 'Firearm'). Inherits weap:Weapon properties (make, model, caliber, serialNumber, serialNumberObliterated).

Handgun.description: A firearm designed to be held and fired in one or two hands without shoulder bracing (pistol, revolver). 18 U.S.C. § 921(a)(30); CCO 'Hand Gun'.

LongGun.description: A firearm with a longer barrel than a handgun, fired while braced against the shoulder. CCO 'Long Gun'.

Rifle.description: A long gun with a rifled barrel firing single bullets over long ranges with high accuracy. 18 U.S.C. § 921(a)(7); CCO 'Rifle'.

Shotgun.description: A long gun designed to fire packets of shot, a single slug, or a specialty round. 18 U.S.C. § 921(a)(5); CCO 'Shotgun'.

CuttingWeapon.description: A weapon designed to inflict harm by cutting (knife, sword, machete). CCO 'Cutting Weapon'.

Ammunition.description: Ammunition, cartridge cases, primers, bullets, or propellent powder designed for use in any firearm (18 U.S.C. § 921(a)(17)(A); CCO 'Portion of Ammunition'). Use weap:caliber for the cartridge designation.
